title: chrysophyllum africanum var. aubrevillei
intro: Chrysophyllum africanum var. aubrevillei, also known as the Aubreville's African Star Apple, is a plant species within the Sapotaceae family, native to West Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum africanum var. aubrevillei include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing, among other uses. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared into various forms, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments.
